leadText: Sappy Seed (Japanese: すくすくボンバー Fast-Growing Bomber) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves of the partner Eevee.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Seeding Sappy Seed deals damage and plants a seed on the target. Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Sappy Seed has 90 power, 100% accuracy, and 15 PP. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Sappy Seed cannot be selected in a battle. However, it has been modified: it now has 100 power, 90% accuracy, and 10 PP.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E The user grows a gigantic stalk that scatters seeds to attack the target. The seeds drain the target's HP every turn. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
